description: Run-aware evolution graph for deep runs: replay, path focus, comparison, and structured steering.

iframe_commands.name: focus
iframe_commands.description: Focus a path or node in the graph

iframe_commands.name: select-node
iframe_commands.description: Open a node in the inspector

iframe_commands.name: compare
iframe_commands.description: Pin two paths for visual comparison

iframe_commands.name: refresh
iframe_commands.description: Reload evolution.json and child session state
